ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., LMT) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid out by the company on the given date */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company on the given date */,
  "trading_volume_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the trading volume */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., LMT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange the company is listed on */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency the company's stock is traded in */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., LMT) */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the analysts table */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating provided by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or justification for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., LMT) */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
